description: Returns the engine calculated size (terrain side length) of the current world in meters. In Arma, terrains are always square. ([[BIS_fnc_mapSize]] may return the same value, but is just a simple look up in [[configFile | config]]).
examples:
<sqf>
// A round marker that should cover the whole map, placed in the center of the map, should have the following radius (a, b)
private _radius = sqrt 2 / 2 * worldSize;
</sqf>
name: worldSize
